# False positive samples (should NOT be blocked)
aws_region = "ap-northeast-2"
eks_cluster_name = "my-cluster"
base_domain = "example.com"
image_tag = "v1.2.3"
namespace = "sim-hyundai-user-a"
terraform plan -out=tfplan
helm install my-release ./chart
certificate_arn = "arn:aws:acm:ap-northeast-2:123456789012:certificate/abcd-1234"
eae5c07a1b2c3d4e5f6a7b8c9d0e1f2a3b4c5d6e
sha256sum = "a1b2c3d4e5f6a7b8c9d0e1f2a3b4c5d6e7f8a9b0"
